app.title: Useful Utilities Collection
app.tray_message_body: Useful Utilities is running in the background. The microphone guard remains active.
app.confirm_exit_body: Microphone Guard is active. Are you sure you want to exit?

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.page_subtitle: Quick overview and statistics of the useful utility modules.
dashboard.keyboard_card_desc: Shows whether keyboard input is currently locked.
dashboard.mouse_card_desc: Shows whether mouse input is currently locked.
dashboard.microphone_card_desc: Protection state of the Windows default microphone volume.
dashboard.mouse_locked_desc: Mouse input is currently blocked. Emergency unlock remains available.
dashboard.microphone_body_active: Protection state of the Windows default microphone volume.
dashboard.microphone_body_unavailable: The default capture device could not be read.
dashboard.guard_text_unavailable: The Windows default microphone could not be accessed.

input_lock.title: Input Lock
input_lock.page_subtitle: Lock either the keyboard or the mouse. Only one lock can be active at a time.
input_lock.status_hint_unlocked: No input lock is currently active.
input_lock.status_hint_mouse: Mouse input is currently blocked. Use {shortcut} if needed.
input_lock.keyboard_hint: Use this when you want to prevent keyboard input temporarily.
input_lock.mouse_hint: Use this when you want to prevent mouse movement or clicks. Emergency unlock remains available via keyboard shortcut ({shortcut}).

microphone_guard.title: Microphone Guard
microphone_guard.page_subtitle: Protect the Windows microphone volume of the default recording device.
microphone_guard.status_desc_active: The app keeps the Windows microphone volume at the protected target.
microphone_guard.status_desc_inactive: The target is stored, but the app is not correcting microphone volume yet.
microphone_guard.status_desc_unavailable: The default Windows recording device could not be accessed.
microphone_guard.activity_desc: The guard watches the Windows microphone volume and restores it when another app changes it.
microphone_guard.toast_volume_corrected: Microphone volume was restored from {previous}% to {target}%.

settings.title: Settings
settings.page_subtitle: Configure application options, language, and behavior.
settings.shortcut_hint: Key combination to emergency unlock the mouse. Click in the box and press the keys you want to use.
